title: Prado et al_urine cell pellet bulk RNA seq
author: Prado, Kris
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Sequencing reads were aligned to the human genome (hg19) using STAR (ver. 2.7.0). PCR replicates were molecularly removed using a custom barcoding approach that removes duplicated reads. Deduplicated reads were used for gene-expression calculation using RSEM38 (ver. 1.2.28). RSEM expected counts were normalized to transcripts per million (TPM) method.
steps_raw: Sequencing reads were aligned to the human genome (hg19) using STAR (ver. 2.7.0). PCR replicates were molecularly removed using a custom barcoding approach that removes duplicated reads. Deduplicated reads were used for gene-expression calculation using RSEM38 (ver. 1.2.28). RSEM expected counts were normalized to transcripts per million (TPM) method.
